target: (Ushio, with her conspicuous blonde hair and blue eyes, stood out a lot, and was often teased by the local brats.)
(But Ushio would stand up to them and punch them right back...)

I-I didn't call out to you with that intention, though...
I was being teased, so you tried to help me, right?
You know... Don't do dangerous things like that anymore.
